title: FLOSS Weekly 670: SSI and Digital wallets
summary:
Darrell O'Donnell of Continuum Loop tells Doc Searls and Shawn Powers how digital wallets will have to work in a world of self-sovereign identity (SSI) on this episode of FLOSS Weekly. Digital wallets will have all the identity information you need, but with the ability to confine output to only what another party needs to know and nothing more.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
